title: Printing Character Sets
text: Printing Character Sets To print, choose the device translation table that is specific for the character set. The following table shows examples of installable character sets and their corresponding device translation tables. Table 1. Device translation tables available for installable character sets Installable character set Enhanced printing Normal printing English P_MSWINX P_MSWIN3 Central European P_MSWINX_1250 P_MSWIN3_1250 Cyrillic P_MSWINX_1251 P_MSWIN3_1251 Arabic P_MSWINX_1256, P_MSWINX_AIX P_MSWIN3_1256,P_MSWIN3_AIX Greek P_MSWINX_1253 P_MSWIN3_1253 Hebrew P_MSWINX_1255 P_MSWIN3_1255 Simplified Chinese P_MSWINX_GB P_MSWIN3_GB Korean P_MSWINX_KSC P_MSWIN3_KSC Japanese P_MSWINX_SJIS, P_MSWINX_SJIS_1 P_MSWIN3_SJIS, P_MSWIN3_SJIS_1 Traditional Chinese P_MSWINX P_MSWIN3 For Arabic and Hebrew support, additional functionality is provided by the assignment setting $RTL_PRINTING .
